item.description:
Cloud cache freshness fix:

- Recover summaries from pre-summarize transcript caches: if a ready recording has cached transcript text but no summary, Recappi now forces a one-time refetch instead of returning stale cached content forever.
- Track `recording.updatedAt` at transcript-cache write time, so later detail refreshes can detect when the cloud recording advanced after the transcript was cached.
- Persist the new freshness snapshot in CloudLibrary cache v2 while keeping older v1 cache files readable.
- Verified on Peng's MacBook using a production-style signed/notarized DMG over the original Keychain + CloudCache state; recording `2f30e01e` recovered its Summary section.

This release does not include the SQLite cache migration. That follow-up is tracked separately.
